commands.review_summary:
Adds an onHeartbeat callback to the compaction retry aggregate wait and wires runEmbeddedAttempt to emit run.progress during active compaction retry waits, with focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +78. Total +90 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection shows current main can wait across active compaction retry timeout windows without refreshing run progress, while recovery uses lastProgressAgeMs for stale active progress decisions.
